alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a carboxylic acid substituent attached to a benzene ring.
alternative_parents.name: Benzoic acids and derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a thiazole ring substituted at positions 2, 4 and 5 only.
alternative_parents.name: 2,4,5-trisubstituted thiazoles

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an acyl moiety of benzoic acid with the formula (C6H5CO-).
alternative_parents.name: Benzoyl derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Aliphatic aromatic amines in which the amino group is linked to two aliphatic chains and one aromatic group.
alternative_parents.name: Dialkylarylamines

alternative_parents.description: Carboxylic acid hydrazides with the formula RC(=O)NNC(R')=O ( R,R'=H or organyl group).
alternative_parents.name: Diacylhydrazines

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a 1,3-thiazole ring substituted by an amine group at the 2-position.
alternative_parents.name: 2-amino-1,3-thiazoles

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a hydrogenated pyridine ring (i.e. containing less than the maximum number of double bonds.).
alternative_parents.name: Hydropyridines

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing an aromatic ring where a carbon atom is linked to an hetero atom.
alternative_parents.name: Heteroaromatic compounds

alternative_parents.description: Carboxylic acid amides in which the two acyl groups linked to the central nitrogen atoms are carboacyl groups.
alternative_parents.name: Dicarboximides

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds with the general formula RNHC(=O)CH3, where R= organyl group.
alternative_parents.name: Acetamides

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an heterocycle with at least one nitrogen atom and one carbon atom linked to each other.
alternative_parents.name: Azacyclic compounds

alternative_parents.description: Compounds having the structure RC#N; thus C-substituted derivatives of hydrocyanic acid, HC#N.
alternative_parents.name: Nitriles

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a carbonyl group, with the general structure RC(=O)R', where R=organyl, R'=H, N, O, organyl group or halide group.
alternative_parents.name: Carbonyl compounds

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a bond between carbon a pnictogen atom. Pnictogens are p-block element atoms that are in the group 15 of the periodic table.
alternative_parents.name: Organopnictogen compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an oxide group.
alternative_parents.name: Organic oxides

class.description: Organic compounds containing a nitrogen atom.
class.name: Organonitrogen compounds

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as dicarboxdiimides. These are hydrazine derivatives in which each of the two nitrogen atoms is the central atom of a dicarboximide group.

direct_parent.description: Hydrazine derivatives in which each of the two nitrogen atoms is the central atom of a dicarboximide group.
direct_parent.name: Dicarboxdiimides

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Compounds comprising the hydrazine functional group, with the general formula R1R2NNR3R4.
subclass.name: Hydrazines and derivatives

superclass.description: Organic compounds containing a nitrogen atom.
superclass.name: Organic nitrogen compounds
